titleStmt.title: SII 23.376: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 376. (A.R. No. 376 of 1907.) Māyūram, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Pañchanadēśvara temple—on the same wall

summary.p: This is dated in the 300th day of the 19th year of an unspecified king who might probably be Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa III. The inscription is damaged. It seems to give the extent of lands and their yield in paddy as entered in the uḷvari taxregisters of the temple by order of the king and attested by the Puravuvari officers. Mention is made of such lands both tax paying and tax-free as were granted to the temple in the 21st year of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa (I) ‘who abolished the tolls’ and of those endowed by one Kuṟṟālamuḍaiyāṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyār who is said to have built (or rebuilt ?) the temple of Tiruvaiyāṟuḍaiyār with its courtyard, surrounding streets flower-garden called Vīrarākkadaṉ-tirunandavaṉam and a maṭha called Vikkiramaśōḻaṉ-maḍam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yāṇṭu 10 9 ḷ 3 100- ṉāl niṅkalākkiṉapaṭi
kku Uḷvari . jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanā
ṭṭut tiruvaḻuntūr nāṭṭu kulot
tuṅkacoḻanallūrāṉa kulottuṅ

yuḷ n=ta2 Uṭaiyār cuṅkan tavittaruḷi

vatu Iṟaikkaṭṭiṉa nilattāl I 6 1000

ṭaiyāṉ I tevaṉ tirucciṟṟampa
la muṭaiyar
Eḻuntaruḷuvitta tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyā
lun tirumuṟṟamum tirumaṭai
viḷākamum virarākkataṉ tirunantavaṉa
tirumaṭaiviḷākattu Ivar Eṭuppikkiṟa vik
kiramacoḻaṉ maṭamum Uḷḷiṭṭaṉavaiyi
ṟṟukku kollai nilattu muṉṉuṭaiyā
rum Iṟaikaṭṭukkuṭalāy varukiṟapaṭiyum
niṅkalāka nikkiṉa śrīkoyilun ti
rumuṟṟamum tirumaṭaiviḷākamum Uḷḷiṭṭa
vaiyiṟṟukku nilam [ 1000 1- li] virarākkataṉ tiru
nantavaṉam nilam 4 li Āka nilam ruli ṉāli
l Opātipaṭi Iṟai I 3 100 7 10 3 ? 9ṅa nilam

Ivai puravari cikaraṇa nāyakam pālaiyūr kiḻa
vaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravari cikaraṇanāyakam
perunallūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivaipura
vari cikaraṇa nāyakam pantaṇai nallūruṭai
yāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravari cikaraṇa nāyaka
maluṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravari cika
raṇamukaveṭṭi perumaṅkala muṭaiyāṉ
Eḻuttu Ivaipuravari cikaraṇa mukaveṭṭi teṟku
ṉeḻuttu Ivai kacciyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai campeṟṟaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu
ṉṟaṅkiḻāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravari cikaraṇa
ttu mukaveṭṭi pantaṇai nallūruṭaiyāṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai puravaricikaraṇattu mukave
ṭṭi Uḻuntaiyuṭaiyāṉeḻuttu ..ivai
veṇāṭṭarayaṉ ṉeḻuttu .-ivai coḻako
ṉ Eḻuttu ..ivai paḻantiyarāya ṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.376 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
